title: cynanchica paui subsp. paui
intro: Cynanchica paui subsp. paui, also known as the Paui's Cynanchica or Cynanchum paui subsp. paui, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cynanchica paui subsp. paui include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and infections. Cynanchica paui subsp. paui can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
